provider: CUHK School of Pharmacy Bachelor of Pharmacy curriculum
note: The School of Pharmacy page publishes 57 unique coded courses by Attendance Year. The Research and Pharmacy Clerkship concentrations are alternative final-year paths: PHAR4911 and PHAR4912 belong only to Research, while PHAR4201, PHAR4301 and one of the 18 listed Clerkship options belong only to Pharmacy Clerkship. Year 3 students choose one of PHAR2710 and PHAR2711. Four Free Elective Courses are explicitly listed for Summer Term, but the page does not publish how many are required, so no selection count is inferred. University, College, language, general education and physical education requirements are outside this Programme-specific list. The page was modified in July 2026 but labels its curriculum Last Update April 2025; the maintained academic year is therefore conservatively recorded as 2025-26.
